lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Salok, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤੇ ਸੇਈ ਜਿ ਮੁਖੁ ਨ ਮੋੜੰਨੑਿ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਸਿਞਾਤਾ ਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: rate seee ji mukh na morrana jinaee siyaataa saaee |
lines.english: They alone are imbued with the Lord, who do not turn their faces away from Him - they realize Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੜਿ ਝੜਿ ਪਵਦੇ ਕਚੇ ਬਿਰਹੀ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਕਾਰਿ ਨ ਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jharr jharr pavade kache birahee jinaa kaar na aaee |1|
lines.english: The false, immature lovers do not know the way of love, and so they fall. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂੜੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਲੁਡੰਦੜੀ ਸੋਹਾਂ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੈ ਸਹ ਨਾਲੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhoorree vich luddandarree sohaan naanak tai seh naale |2|
lines.english: Even rolling in the dust, I look beautiful, O Nanak, if my Husband Lord is with me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਣੀ ਵਿਹੂਣਾ ਪਾਟ ਪਟੰਬਰ ਭਾਹੀ ਸੇਤੀ ਜਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: dhanee vihoonaa paatt pattanbar bhaahee setee jaale |
lines.english: Without my Master, I will burn my silk and satin clothes in the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਤੇ ਪੰਚ ਬੈਰਾਈਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਫਲ ਮਾਰੂ ਇਹੁ ਰਾਗੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jeete panch bairaaeea naanak safal maaroo ihu raag |3|
lines.english: When the five enemies are overcome, O Nanak, this musical measure of Raga Maaroo becomes frtuiful. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਅਰਾਧੀਐ ਨਾਮਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਬੈਰਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad araadheeai naam rang bairaag |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I worship and adore the Naam, with love and balanced detachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਂ ਮੂੰ ਇਕੁ ਤ ਲਖ ਤਉ ਜਿਤੀ ਪਿਨਣੇ ਦਰਿ ਕਿਤੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaan moon ik ta lakh tau jitee pinane dar kitarre |
lines.english: When I have the One Lord, I have tens of thousands. Otherwise, people like me beg from door to door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਮਣੁ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਗਇਓ ਜਨੰਮੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਤੋ ਸੋ ਵਿਸਰੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: baaman birathaa geo janam jin keeto so visare |4|
lines.english: O Brahmin, your life has passed away uselessly; you have forgotten the One who created you. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਈਅਹਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak raam naam gun gaaeeeh daragah niramal soe |5|
lines.english: O Nanak, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name, one's reputation is immaculate in the Court of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਸੋ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਜੀਐ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਫੀਕਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth so ras peejeeai kabahoo na feekaa hoe |
lines.english: In Raga Sorat'h, drink in this sublime essence, which never loses its taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਈ ॥
lines.translit: andar naam nidhaan sadaa gun saaree |
lines.english: The treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is within them. They cherish His Glorious Virtues forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਰਖੇ ਆਪਿ ਤਿਨ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮਾਰਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo prabh rakhe aap tin koe na maaree |
lines.english: No one can kill those whom God Himself protects.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਾ ਟੇਕ ਅਗੰਮ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਾਰਈ ॥
lines.translit: ekaa ttek agam man tan prabh dhaaree |
lines.english: They take the Support of the One, the Inaccessible Lord; they enshrine God in their mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਕੋ ਨ ਉਤਾਰਈ ॥
lines.translit: lagaa rang apaar ko na utaaree |
lines.english: They are imbued with the Love of the Infinite Lord, and no one can wipe it away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਰਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har gun gaae sehaj sukh saaree |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord; they obtain the most excellent celestial peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਉਰਿ ਹਾਰਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak naam nidhaan ridai ur haaree |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, they enshrine the treasure of the Naam in their hearts. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਚੰਗਾ ਮਾਨਿ ਦੁਯੀ ਗਣਤ ਲਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kare su changaa maan duyee ganat laeh |
lines.english: Whatever God does, accept that as good; leave behind all other judgements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਦੇਹੁ ਮਤੀ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jan dehu matee upades vichahu bharam jaae |
lines.english: Instruct yourself with the Teachings, and doubt will depart from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ਆਪੇ ਲੈਹੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: apanee nadar nihaal aape laihu laae |
lines.english: He shall cast His Glance of Grace, and attach you to Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਲੇਖੁ ਸੋਈ ਸਭ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa lekh soee sabh kamaae |
lines.english: Everyone does that which is pre-ordained by destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਅਨਦ ਭਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak sukh anad bhe prabh kee man rajaae |7|
lines.english: Nanak is in peace and bliss, accepting the Will of God. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਦੈ ਵਸਿ ਦੂਜੀ ਨਾਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kachh tis dai vas doojee naeh jaae |
lines.english: Everything is under His control; there is no other place at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਿਨ ਸਿਮਰਿਆ ਸੇਈ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa jin simariaa seee bhe nihaal |
lines.english: Those who meditate in remembrance on the Perfect Guru, are exalted and uplifted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਰਾਧਣਾ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਆਵੈ ਰਾਸਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam araadhanaa kaaraj aavai raas |8|
lines.english: O Nanak, dwelling on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all affairs are resolved. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਏ ਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paapee karam kamaavade karade haae haae |
lines.english: The sinners act, and generate bad karma, and then they weep and wail.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਉ ਮਥਨਿ ਮਾਧਾਣੀਆ ਤਿਉ ਮਥੇ ਧ੍ਰਮ ਰਾਇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak jiau mathan maadhaaneea tiau mathe dhram raae |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, just as the churning stick churns the butter, so does the Righteous Judge of Dharma churn them. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਜਨਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਜੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam dhiaaein saajanaa janam padaarath jeet |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, O friend, the treasure of life is won.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਧਰਮ ਐਸੇ ਚਵਹਿ ਕੀਤੋ ਭਵਨੁ ਪੁਨੀਤ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak dharam aise chaveh keeto bhavan puneet |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, speaking in Righteousness, one's world becomes sanctified. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਭੜੀ ਕੁਥਾਇ ਮਿਠੀ ਗਲਣਿ ਕੁਮੰਤ੍ਰੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: khubharree kuthaae mitthee galan kumantreea |
lines.english: I am stuck in an evil place, trusting the sweet words of an evil advisor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਈ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਿਨਾ ਭਾਗੁ ਮਥਾਹਿ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak seee ubare jinaa bhaag mathaeh |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone are saved, who have such good destiny inscribed upon their foreheads. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਵਿਛੋਹਾ ਧਣੀ ਸਉ ਅਠੇ ਪਹਰ ਲਵੰਨੑਿ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: prem vichhohaa dhanee sau atthe pehar lavana |12|
lines.english: Those who have been separated from the Love of their Master, scream and cry twenty-four hours a day. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤੜੇ ਸੁਖੀ ਸਵੰਨੑਿ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਸਹ ਆਪਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: sutarre sukhee savana jo rate seh aapanai |
lines.english: They alone sleep and dream in peace, who are imbued with the Love of their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤੜੇ ਅਸੰਖ ਮਾਇਆ ਝੂਠੀ ਕਾਰਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: sutarre asankh maaeaa jhootthee kaarane |
lines.english: Millions are asleep, in the false illusion of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਤਿਸਨਾ ਪੇਖਿ ਭੁਲਣੇ ਵੁਠੇ ਨਗਰ ਗੰਧ੍ਰਬ ॥
lines.translit: mrig tisanaa pekh bhulane vutthe nagar gandhrab |
lines.english: Seeing the mirage, the optical illusion, the people are confused and deluded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਜਾਗੰਨੑਿ ਜਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਚਾਰਣੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak se jaagana ji rasanaa naam uchaarane |13|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone are awake and aware, who chant the Naam with their tongues. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਥ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: patit udhaaran paarabraham samrath purakh apaar |
lines.english: The All-powerful Supreme Lord God, the Infinite Primal Being, is the Saving Grace of sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਚੁ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਫਬ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: jinee sach araadhiaa naanak man tan fab |14|
lines.english: Those who worship and adore the True Lord, O Nanak, their minds and bodies are beautiful. ||14||
